scripts.check: pnpm run fable:build && pnpm run proofs && pnpm run check:targets
scripts.corpus: pnpm --dir apps/proofs build && node apps/proofs/dist/Main.js proof targets t1-durable
scripts.fable:build: export NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/.nuget/packages}; dotnet restore Firegrid.Fable.slnx ${NUGET_CONFIG:+--configfile "$NUGET_CONFIG"} -v:q && dotnet build Firegrid.Fable.slnx --no-restore -v:q && pnpm --dir src/Firegrid.Log build && pnpm --dir src/Firegrid.Store build && pnpm --dir src/Firegrid.Durable build && pnpm --dir src/Firegrid.Grid build && pnpm --dir apps/proofs build
